_instructions: 1. Copy this file and rename to {area_id}.json
2. Replace all placeholder values (AREA_ID, Area Name, etc.)
3. Add the area to _index.json areas[] array
4. Run: cd app && npx vitest run src/lib/__tests__/knowledge-tree.test.ts
name: Area Name
description: Brief description of what this knowledge area covers
howto: Example: To do X, go to Y and click Z
dont: Example: Do not do X because Y
